base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of party_5 — a character (boss) from 1996 super mario rpg. Mario (jumps), Mallow (frog-prince weather magic), Geno (toy-doll sentient star), Bowser (joinable!), Peach (healer). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Mario (jumps), Mallow (frog-prince weather magic), Geno (toy-doll sentient star), Bowser (joinable!), Peach (healer)
